meta_title: For Founders: marketing automation to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Marketing Automation to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start shipping revenue. Learn to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build marketing automation for your SaaS MVP.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic, you can automate your marketing outreach in under an hour. This approach shifts your focus from syntax to business validation, ensuring your MVP generates real revenue immediately.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks watching YouTube tutorials, stacking up bookmarks, and tweaking your boilerplate, yet your SaaS dashboard remains empty. This is the silent killer of startups: tutorial hell. It is a sophisticated form of procrastination that feels like progress but delivers zero market traction.

Today, we pivot. We are moving from learning to building. By leveraging the combined power of Antigravity and Claude Code, we will automate your marketing pipeline. This isn't about code quality; it is about building a feedback loop that brings your first paying users through the door while you sleep.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Before writing code, define the trigger and action for your automation. We are building a lead-capture flow that sends a personalized value-add email to new signups.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a Lead object containing email, source, and status. Define a webhook endpoint to receive data from a landing page form.

steps.title: Setup the Automation Infrastructure
steps.description: Establish the environment where your logic will reside. We need a lightweight service that handles incoming webhooks and triggers our marketing sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate Node.js service that listens for POST requests and validates incoming JSON payloads against the Lead schema.

steps.title: Implement the Outreach Logic
steps.description: Connect your service to an email provider API. This ensures every lead is automatically nurtured with high-value content immediately upon signup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service function that takes a Lead email and sends a welcome template using the Resend API. Include error handling for failed requests.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push your code to a live environment so your marketing efforts can begin capturing data immediately. Speed is your competitive advantage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a deployment manifest for a serverless environment that scales automatically based on incoming traffic.

steps.title: Monitor and Iterate
steps.description: Use Claude Code to analyze logs and optimize your automation based on real-world interaction data from your first users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze existing logs to identify potential bottlenecks in the lead processing pipeline and suggest performance improvements.

pro_tips: Never build an auth system from scratch; use Clerk or Supabase to reclaim 20 hours of development time.
Prioritize 'ugly' functional code over 'pretty' code; users pay for solutions, not elegant architecture.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests after the code is working, not before, to maintain high velocity.
If an automation step takes more than 10 minutes to code, you are over-engineering; use a third-party API instead.
Always include a 'Reply' field in your automated emails to encourage direct founder-to-customer conversations.
content.next_steps: Now that your automated lead capture is live, spend the next 48 hours driving traffic to your landing page. Do not touch the code until you have 10 signups.
content.conversion_block: Stop hiding behind tutorials and start building a business that scales. Leverage these tools to automate your growth and focus on what truly matters: your customers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
